taxonomy: Uragoga cochoeirensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to tropical Africa, where it grows in dense forests. The classification of Uragoga cochoeirensis includes its kingdom as Plantae, and its order as Gentianales. Within the Rubiaceae family, Uragoga cochoeirensis is placed in the subfamily Ixoroideae. Further classification includes the tribe Ixoreae, and possibly the genus Uragoga.
